inputs.label: Current Age
inputs.businessContext: Your current age for determining the investment horizon until retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your current age for determining the investment horizon until retirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırım ufkunu emekliliğe kadar belirlemek için mevcut yaşınız.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ihr aktuelles Alter zur Bestimmung des Anlagehorizonts bis zur Rente.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Votre âge actuel pour déterminer l'horizon d'investissement jusqu'à la retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Su edad actual para determinar el horizonte de inversión hasta la jubilación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عمرك الحالي لتحديد أفق الاستثمار حتى التقاعد.

inputs.label: Annual Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Amount you contribute annually to your HSA from your own funds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount you contribute annually to your HSA from your own funds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kendi fonlarınızdan HSA'ya yıllık katkı tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, den Sie jährlich aus eigenen Mitteln in Ihr HSA einzahlen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant que vous cotisez annuellement à votre HSA sur vos propres fonds.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad que aporta anualmente a su HSA de sus propios fondos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ الذي تساهم به سنويًا في حساب التوفير الصحي الخاص بك من أموالك الخاصة.

inputs.label: Initial Balance
inputs.businessContext: Current balance already in the HSA account.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current balance already in the HSA account.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Solde actuel déjà dans le compte HSA.
businessContext_i18n.es: Saldo actual ya en la cuenta HSA.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرصيد الحالي الموجود بالفعل في حساب HSA.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected average annual rate of return on HSA investments (before inflation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average annual rate of return on HSA investments (before inflation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: HSA yatırımlarında beklenen yıllık ortalama getiri oranı (enflasyon öncesi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete durchschnittliche jährliche Rendite der HSA-Anlagen (vor Inflation).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement annuel moyen attendu des investissements HSA (avant inflation).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de rendimiento anual promedio esperada de las inversiones HSA (antes de inflación).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط معدل العائد السنوي المتوقع على استثمارات HSA (قبل التضخم).

inputs.label: Marginal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Your federal marginal income tax rate used to estimate tax savings on contributions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your federal marginal income tax rate used to estimate tax savings on contributions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katkılardaki vergi tasarrufunu tahmin etmek için federal marjinal gelir vergisi oranınız.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ihr bundesstaatlicher Grenzsteuersatz zur Schätzung der Steuerersparnis bei Einzahlungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Votre taux marginal d'imposition fédéral utilisé pour estimer les économies d'impôt sur les cotisations.
businessContext_i18n.es: Su tasa impositiva marginal federal utilizada para estimar el ahorro fiscal en las contribuciones.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل ضريبة الدخل الهامشية الفيدرالي المستخدم لتقدير الوفورات الضريبية على المساهمات.

inputs.label: Years Until Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Number of years you plan to contribute before retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years you plan to contribute before retirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emeklilik öncesi katkı yapmayı planladığınız yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, in denen Sie vor der Rente einzahlen möchten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années pendant lesquelles vous prévoyez cotiser avant la retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años que planea contribuir antes de la jubilación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد السنوات التي تخطط للمساهمة فيها قبل التقاعد.

inputs.label: Employer Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Annual contribution from your employer to your HSA, if any.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual contribution from your employer to your HSA, if any.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Beitrag Ihres Arbeitgebers zu Ihrem HSA, falls vorhanden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Cotisation annuelle de votre employeur à votre HSA, le cas échéant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Contribución anual de su empleador a su HSA, si corresponde.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المساهمة السنوية من صاحب العمل في حساب HSA الخاص بك، إن وجدت.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
